# Fehem Skill Pack

This folder contains workspace-local skills for UI quality and output rigor.

Available skills:
- `taste-skill`: default premium frontend generation rules
- `redesign-skill`: audit-first redesign workflow for existing screens
- `soft-skill`: calm, soft, high-end visual language
- `minimalist-skill`: editorial minimalist visual language
- `brutalist-skill`: bold mechanical visual language
- `output-skill`: complete output enforcement
- `stitch-skill`: generate semantic `DESIGN.md` for Stitch

Usage guidance:
- Start with `taste-skill` for new UI tasks.
- Add exactly one visual style skill (`soft`, `minimalist`, or `brutalist`).
- Add `output-skill` when full file-by-file delivery is required.
- Use `redesign-skill` before editing mature existing pages.
